notes: Bumped after v0.100.0..v0.101.0 sweep. Applied 3 edits. (1) deploy/environment.mdx — PARTNER_API_CURSOR_SIGNING_KEY added to the Authentication & Security table. CARRIED-OVER GAP, not from this range: the var shipped in v0.97.0 (#2506) and is production-boot-blocking (config/validate.ts, isProduction branch: canonical base64 decoding to >=32 bytes, must not reuse JWT_SECRET), but it was never documented on the docs site — it exists only in .env.example, docker-compose.yml and deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml. The v0.97.0 sweep wrote this row but was never committed (stale uncommitted edits still sitting in the ~/breeze main checkout, mtime Jul 19, would regress this tracker to v0.97.0 if ever committed — do NOT commit them); the v0.99.0 and v0.100.0 sweeps both recorded docs as current and missed it. (2) features/watchdog.mdx — new note under How It Works: heartbeat freshness uses the freshest of on-disk state file OR live IPC state_sync, so an AV/EDR-blocked state file is a blocked writer not a dead agent; IPC liveness counts any received envelope, not only ping replies (#2769). (3) features/reports.mdx — Security & Compliance Posture: 'Security products in use' now reports activeDeviceCoverage ('200 devices, 1 with real-time protection on'), shown only when the RTP subset is smaller than the install count, omitted for integration-only evidence (#2517). SKIPPED (no admin-facing doc surface): agent command-poll DB connection double-hold #2765 (internal), helper/watchdog updater ServerURL provider #2478 (internal, no operator-visible config), user-context helper log shipping #2483 (internal fix, log-shipping page already describes intended behavior), scheduled Windows helper duplication #2530 and desktop-helper PID-reuse TOCTOU #2531 (internal agent lifecycle), portal cookie Secure-from-transport #2611 (behavior now matches what deploy docs already prescribe via TRUST_PROXY_HEADERS/TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS, both already documented; no doc change needed), breeze-ext realpath guard + validate #2657 (developer-only extension CLI), helper Role typing #2532, breeze-backup untracking #2594. No new env vars introduced BY this range, no new doc pages, no help-panel docsMapping.ts change (no new routes). CARRIED-OVER GAPS from prior sweeps otherwise unchanged.
